title: After-Action Report — Engine Style Library, Eclectic Randomizer, Reseed-into-Style + Infrastructure-Driven Regional Leagues
scope: User wanted to "start expanding the tuning engine library way more than what we have now & to add more presets for various worldwide leagues so [they] can just start testing and playing."

rationale.item: Initial ask: a much bigger preset library plus an eclectic randomizer; then "national league" / worldwide playstyles.

Correction on talent scope: styles should shape regens / new-gens, not retroactively rewrite existing players — and that's the point, not a caveat. They also wanted "different kinds of resets" — the ability to reseed a league into a style in one action.
Hard correction on calibration: "I don't care if scores blow past 19-26 r/g, I never set that rule." R/G is NOT a target; presets are defined by direction/identity, never tuned to hit a number.

Reframe of "worldwide": "O27 isn't baseball taking root in existing baseball countries. It's a new sport spreading through cricket countries, secondary markets, urban environments where a full baseball field is impossible." Play style must emerge from infrastructure, economics, and existing athletic culture — refusing tropes. Field size is the single biggest variable.

Field dimensions were previously rolled from one global shape distribution, so regions could only differ by talent/weather — which would have erased the user's central thesis (small urban footprint vs. converted cricket ground).

delegation_events.decision: Scoping: build the park-geometry hook; regions as standalone single-league configs; identity from geometry + talent + weather only
delegation_events.quote: I surfaced three scoping decisions; the user chose: (a) build the per-league park-geometry hook, (b) ship regions as standalone single-league configs (not a unified universe), (c) identity from geometry + talent + weather this round (no per-league joker-mix / stay biasing yet).
"I don't care if scores blow past 19-26 r/g, I never set that rule."

delegation_events.decision: Styles shape regens, not existing players
delegation_events.quote: styles should shape regens / new-gens, not retroactively rewrite existing players — and that's the *point*, not a caveat.

actions.description: Engine style-preset shelf grown 2 → 12 (era_1968, era_1987, era_2010s_tto, junkball, launch_circus, contact_carnival, speed_demon, workhorse, knifes_edge, pitchers_hellscape) bundling live mechanics knobs and GEN_SHIFT_* talent knobs
Eclectic randomizer: randomize_overrides(seed, n_knobs) + _RANDOMIZE_RANGES (27 guard-railed knobs); 🎲 Randomize button + seed field, action == "randomize" branch
Reseed-a-league-into-a-style: POST /api/league/reseed-with-style resolving the style bundle before the wipe, re-storing after init_db() but before seed_league(); confirm-gated UI
Per-league park geometry hook: _roll_park_dimensions(rng, shape_weights), _PARK_PROFILES (six named geometries), _resolve_park_shape_weights(), park_profiles config block read in seed_league
Blended-locale cities: _resolve_locale_city_keys unions each region's city pools; fixed dict-locale crash on non-canonical league names

Tropical/arid city coverage added to weather table (Davao, Quezon City, Medan, Semarang, Makassar, Johor Bahru, Kota Kinabalu, Ho Chi Minh, Abidjan, Kinshasa, Apia, Nukuʻalofa, Ahmedabad/Rawalpindi, etc.)
Six standalone region configs pairing park profile + talent style_profiles + name-region pipeline + host cities; universe spec docs updated (§5b park_profiles + weather note)

risk_posture: No DB schema changes (`park_profiles` is config-time only; it feeds the existing `teams.park_shape` / `park_dimensions` columns from the prior ballpark work).
No target band enforced — overshoot is fine; only shape matters.
Existing players are never rewritten (structural: loading a style only setattrs config + writes sim_meta; nothing UPDATEs the players table).
Per the user's explicit instruction, no preset or region was tuned toward a target R/G. Verification checks direction/shape relative to default only.

validation_claims.claim: Presets move in the intended direction (o27 fixture batch, 120 games): e.g. era_1968 25.5 R/G vs default 32.2; knifes_edge 47.1; pitchers_hellscape 20.3
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run the fixture batch under each preset

validation_claims.claim: 200 seeds: every produced value within its _RANDOMIZE_RANGES bound, contact triple sums ~1.0, 8-12 knobs perturbed, no degenerate/crash output
validation_claims.check_method: Loop randomize_overrides over 200 seeds and assert bounds

validation_claims.claim: Reseeding into era_1968 shifted the regenerated pool's mean PITCHING 38.2 → 42.8 and POWER 49.6 → 46.2, and the style survived the DB rebuild (15 overrides still live)
validation_claims.check_method: Call the reseed route and inspect sim_meta + player means

validation_claims.claim: HR% spans 3.69 → 9.46 (2.5×) purely from park geometry + talent pool (2-week sim, seed 7)
validation_claims.check_method: Seed each region config with seed 7 and sim 2 weeks

validation_claims.claim: Hot/humid team-city share after the coverage fix: region_sea_urban 14/14, region_subcontinent 11/12, region_brazil 9/10, region_west_indies 9/12, region_africa 8/12, region_pacific 5/8
validation_claims.check_method: Seed regions and count climate archetypes per team city

validation_claims.claim: pytest tests/ (excluding the DB-seed-dependent test_stat_invariants): 130 passed, 7 skipped. Existing configs o27_global (84 teams), international (36), 30teams all seed without regression.
validation_claims.check_method: Run pytest tests/ and seed the named configs

non_actions.item: Unified universe with inter-league signings (and the "Japanese/Korean players in the SE Asian league" cross-pollination)
non_actions.reason: declined this round; that cross-pollination is properly an emergent property of a unified universe, where inter-league signings are real

non_actions.item: Per-league joker-archetype mix and stay-skill biasing
non_actions.reason: would need a second engine hook (jokers + stay attrs are global today). Deferred.

non_actions.item: Pushing triples/inside-the-park harder for oval parks
non_actions.reason: would need the global ITP knobs, left untouched per the geometry+talent+weather scope
Standalone regions have postseason: "none" (mirrors the peer-universe convention)
GEN_SHIFT_* is global; style_profiles is the per-league lever and it shifts the mean, not the spread.

non_actions.item: east_asia slice in SE Asia config
non_actions.reason: dropped to keep its climate coherent (it was dragging in cold Sapporo)

residual_risks: GEN_SHIFT_* is global; style_profiles shifts the mean, not the spread — "widest variance" (West Indies) is approximated via a mixed origin pipeline, not a true σ bump.
Player-origin and team-city are coupled in a standalone single-league config.
Oval parks suppress HRs strongly but boost triples/ITP only modestly.
Weather's mechanical effect is modest (stamina-decay ~0.95-1.07); regional fatigue identity leans more on the talent pool than on climate alone.
open_hooks: More global styles can be added as pure data (a config + optional new park profile) with no engine change.
Per-league joker-mix / stay biasing as a second engine hook.
Unified universe with inter-league signings for cross-pollination.
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — Engine Style Library, Eclectic Randomizer, Reseed-into-Style + Infrastructure-Driven Regional Leagues
Part 5 — Blended-locale cities + weather coverage (supporting fixes)
Presets move in the intended direction (o27 fixture batch, 120 games)
Geometry drives regional style (2-week sim, seed 7)
unmapped_content: Reseed footgun detail: /api/season/reset does db.drop_all(), which drops sim_meta — wiping the engine tuning — before it regenerates; the new route resolves the style bundle before the wipe. Region config table (parks/talent/origin pipelines per region, team counts 14/12/12/12/10/8). Preset metrics table and region R/g//HR/g//HR%//3B/g table. Reused-vs-new section: reused the ballpark-shape system (oval shape pre-labeled "Cricket-Ground Revival"), style_profiles + name_regions infrastructure and regions.json pipelines, weather climate-archetype system, preset persistence path; new: 10 presets, randomizer, reseed route, geometry hook + six park profiles, dict-locale resolution, six region configs. Process notes: scope corrected four times; the biggest pivot was rejecting national-character framing; mapping what the engine can express made the build small; regions.json already encoded the user's thesis; "is a region a config or an engine change?" answered as mostly config (~90-line hook); dict-locale crash caught before shipping; weather coverage gap caught by measuring (7/14 SE-Asian cities silently temperate). Files-changed diffstat block (engine_config +248, app.py +81, engine_settings.html +88, league.py +89, team_naming.py +27, weather.py +17, _UNIVERSE_SPEC.md +35, region_*.json NEW × 6). Talent means at seed 7 (subcontinent POWER 44 / CONTACT 55 / MOVEMENT 54 / PITCHING 35; Pacific POWER 56 / CMD 44; Brazil PITCHING 32).
parser_notes: Well-formed AAR with explicit 'Honest gaps' and 'Process notes' sections. Date from 'Date completed: 2026-05-25'. Branch claude/tuning-library-expansion-3fFTu; no commit hashes listed.
